feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Monitor Material Coverage - Days' Supply
entry.content:
Hi,

Our customer has a raw material component with a projected shortage. When looking at the Days Supply from Monitor Material Coverage view, it is listed as 9999 days.

However, when opening material in Manage Material Coverage, Days' Supply is now 0. 

 

Would anyone be able to suggest why there would be a discrepancy between these two fields, as it is causing confusing for the end-users?

entry.title: Call SFTP from S/4 - HEC system (infrastructure options)
entry.content:
Hi, 

  We have a S/4 system hosted on sap HEC under RISE model. We need to use a integration with customer SFTP server onpremise, but we have no CPI. We are trying to find options for this integration.  

I can only think in creating a shell script that user sftp os command to send/receive files from sftp server, and call this script from an sm49 external command. 

Have someone found an scenario like this ? Is there another option to call a SFTP server from ABAP ? I think it could be dificult to test withou access to OS.

best regards

entry.title: S4 and SAC Connectivity : Do we need to open the HTTP flow between S4Hana and SAC ?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

In our endeavor to establish a live data connection between our S4Hana environment and SAC (SAP Analytics Cloud), we are in the preparatory phase and have a couple of inquiries:

  1. Do we need to initiate service requests to facilitate communication flow between S4Hana and SAC (HTTP)?

  2. Is SSL configuration required at the S4Hana level?

I appreciate your ideas and assistance greatly


Thank you

entry.title: SAP Content Server with cloud connector
entry.content:
Dears,

 

we trying to test scenario ,

we have S4H system on cloud, we need to connect to on premise content server using sap cloud connector but we don't have any documentation , we have trying the below steps 

  1. install sap cloud connector
  2. in access Control we add aconnection type Cloud To On-Premise
  3. we add resource under the connection type

  1. then we go to sap BTP cockpit to create the destination
  2. now i think that the next step is to create a content repository in OAC0 , but i don't know whih hostname /ip that will be used 

Any Help for the correct way for connecting the on premise content server ?

Also does we need a physical public IP address for the onpremise content server to be connected using sap cc?

 

Regards,,

entry.title: Are there any best practice guidelines for client-specific Customizing in EML for S/4HANA?
entry.content:
Are there any best practice guidelines, recommendations, or restrictions suggested by SAP for client-specific Customizing or Configuration in the Enterprise Management Layer (EML) for SAP S/4HANA greenfield implementation? Or can the Customizing be done similarly to any other S/4HANA On-Premise implementations?

RISE with SAP SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud SAP S/4HANA SAP Activate 

@Petra_Ohlinger

entry.title: Adding new fields to Characteristics catalogue.
entry.content:
Dear aATP experts, we have requirement to add new characteristics for Alternative base confirmations & Location substitutions.

Please help us with information How to add new characteristic (ex: Zip Code, Transportation Zone) to catalogue.

 

Thank you.

Satwik Joshi

entry.title: Error: To create a mapping, use the development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL).
entry.content:
Hi,

I´m triying to use the App Renumber G/L Accounts but i get this message:To create a mapping, use thSAP HANA Cloud, SAP Adaptive e development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL).

I have SAP S/4Hana Cloud 2402, i saw the note SAP 3289450 - Error ' To create a mapping, use the development system (3SL) or Q system (2SL) in 'Renumber G/L Accounts' but the Resolution says:System working as Designed

entry.title: Changing career from B1 specialist to S/4HANA
entry.content: I have 15 years of experience in SAP business one as power user as I was a VP of a medium organization but I find the opportunities limited in terms of size of organizations and salary in comparison to SAP s/4HANA. Looking for suggestions such as I have some experience with course work in SAP Supply chain management in ECC, but I spent the majority of my time in Business one in the finance side of the things with a focus on marketing documents we would call it  (A/R and A/P invoices). I did various system upgrade in business one along with process and query optimizations.

entry.title: Is direct SAP HANA database connectivity permitted in RISE - SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition?
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Our objective is to integrate SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud Edition (RISE) with our Data Warehouse system, utilizing ODBC-based connectivity to establish a direct connection with the SAP HANA database.

We are keen to ascertain the feasibility of establishing direct ODBC connectivity to the SAP HANA database within the SAP S/4HANA Private Cloud RISE Edition. Your insights on this matter would be greatly valued as we proceed with our integration plans.

Kind regards, Vijay

entry.title: Business partner types/roles
entry.content: Where would I go to know what each business partner roles does?

entry.title: Business partner types/roles
entry.content: For the material master does the material type have certain limitations where it can be used in SAP? Procurement vs. Sales? Also could we create a type?

entry.title: Key differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Can anyone tell the differences between MDG on SAP S/4 HANA and SAP S/4 HANA Cloud. How feasible it is to move current MDG system on S/4 Hana on-premise to S/4 Hana Cloud. Do S/4 Hana cloud supports all objects in MDG like Financials, Business partners, Material etc...

Any SAP blogs/ Support portal links would help.

entry.title: Extract Header/Item Texts of Billing Documents
entry.content:
Dear Community,

Is it possible to take an extract of the Header/Item Texts entered in 'Manage Billing Documents' Launchpad app?

entry.title: Mapping fields of inbound delivery to 3pl
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

I have s4 hana cloud private edition and i need to make outbound interface between s4 hana to 3pl when inbound delivery created automatically against purchase order and it can be achieved through standard SOAP API Consumption in SAP ABAP. So i want the whole process for fields mapping of inbound delivery between s4 hana and 3pl. 

Thank for your help.

Sarvesh

entry.title: WHERE CAN I FIND CONFIGURATION GUIDES FOR S/4 HANA 2308
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm working on S/4 HANA Public Cloud and need the Configuration Guides for the Treasury area. Many thanks for pointers on where these resources are on SAP's world wide web!

entry.title: Purpose of valuation class
entry.content: I come from the SAP Business One space and part of a S/4 project and in the material master there is a concept I am trying to wrap my head around. It is the Valuation class.

entry.title: SNRO for number range
entry.content: Could a number range be copied from one system to another using SNRO?

entry.title: Update Exchange rate in a posted Journal Entry
entry.content:
Hi Community

Recently we had an issue where the exchange rates didn't automatically get imported, and some journal entries were posted using the incorrect exchange rates.

Is there a way to update the exchange rates on those posted journal entries without reversing and re-posting them?

For additional information we are using S/4 Hana Cloud Private Edition version 2021.

Thanks in advance for your help

Nathan

entry.title: Clean Core Strategy for vendor solutions
entry.content:
How are other customers on S/4 HANA on-premise approaching  vendor pre-built extensions for legal and regulatory requirements that are clearly non clean core and there are no plans to develop a separate non clean core solution. 

Do you stick to clean core principles categorically which potentially means increased cost of a potentially bespoke solution, or do you adopt an approach that is less dogmatic and accept a Tier 3 Extension with the inherent risk to upgrades?

entry.title: MRP Run Process with Delayed sales order with MTS (40) Strategy Group
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

What are the better solutions for the exclude the old sales order from current MRP run without completing  Sales line items?

if sales requirement not deliver as per requested date it should be deliver next delivery date or need to be re-arrange the sales delivery date based on delivery plan , but some time it will not practice in system and it will be impacted for the Production planning cycle on daily , please let me know if have any susses story if you have experience  related to this , and let me know few insight with your experience  

Thanks

Lalith P

Thanks
